blocks.text: Reitan T3 in Palm Beach — monster weekend on deck
Kristoffer Reitan enters the final round just three shots off Austin Smotherman's lead at the Cognizant Classic. A Norwegian PGA Tour title is on the table.
🏅 Fri 20:00 — Paralympic Winter Games 2026 Opening Ceremony, Milan
